# Test research request

## Topic

What are the tradeoffs between SQLite and PostgreSQL for small web applications?

## Why I'm interested

Choosing a database for a side project.

## What I already know

SQLite is file-based. PostgreSQL is a full server. Not sure about concurrency differences.

## Scope

- [x] Quick overview — concepts and options, 1-2 pages
